title: Block PageIndex same-corpus tree retrieval until node paths map to ELF source ids

encoding.reason: VectifyAI PageIndex same-corpus scoring is blocked until a contained run emits long-document tree artifacts, cited node paths, and PageIndex MCP readback mapped to the ELF Source Library source ids.

follow_up.title: Run PageIndex same-corpus long-document tree adapter
follow_up.reason: The fair comparison needs PageIndex tree nodes and traversal output over the source-library long-document corpus with source ids mapped to benchmark evidence ids.

items.text: ELF same-corpus source output: source_library job source-library-long-doc-001 materializes source id article-source-record with canonical_uri=https://example.com/research/agent-memory-os, source_kind=article, author=Example Research Group, captured_at=2026-06-20T01:10:00Z, and source_ref resolver elf_doc_ext/v1.

ELF same-corpus source output: source_library job source-library-long-doc-001 materializes source id article-hydrated-excerpt with quote source libraries preserve long-form evidence, verified=true, content_hash=long-doc-content-hash, and excerpt_hash=long-doc-excerpt-hash.

PageIndex setup blocker: XY-1068 has no Docker-contained PageIndex installation, no PageIndex MCP readback, and no emitted tree artifact mapping node paths back to source ids article-source-record and article-hydrated-excerpt.

locator.quote: no emitted tree artifact mapping node paths

items.text: PageIndex artifact contract: a runnable same-corpus adapter must emit tree_nodes.json or equivalent, cited node paths, long-document traversal output, source ids, and setup/runtime metadata before PageIndex can be scored.
Decoy: the ELF Source Library long-document pass proves PageIndex parity without running PageIndex tree retrieval.

answer.content: PageIndex remains blocked on the same source-library corpus. ELF materializes source ids article-source-record and article-hydrated-excerpt with source_ref hydration, but no contained PageIndex run has emitted tree_nodes.json, cited node paths, traversal output, or MCP readback mapped to those source ids. No PageIndex parity, win, tie, or loss is claimed.

claims.text: ELF materializes the same-corpus long-document source record and hydrated excerpt source ids.
PageIndex scoring is blocked because no contained PageIndex installation, MCP readback, or tree artifact is checked in.
A runnable PageIndex adapter must emit tree nodes, cited node paths, traversal output, source ids, and setup/runtime metadata before scoring.

timeline.summary: The PageIndex comparison uses the same long-document Source Library corpus ids as the ELF source-library fixture.
PageIndex remains blocked until tree artifacts and MCP readback map back to same-corpus source ids.

prompt.content: Compare PageIndex long-document tree retrieval against the ELF Source Library long-document corpus only if PageIndex emits cited tree artifacts.

must_include.text: ELF materializes the same-corpus long-document source record and hydrated excerpt source ids.
PageIndex scoring is blocked because no contained PageIndex installation, MCP readback, or tree artifact is checked in.
A runnable PageIndex adapter must emit tree nodes, cited node paths, traversal output, source ids, and setup/runtime metadata before scoring.

must_not_include: ELF Source Library long-document pass proves PageIndex parity.
ELF beats PageIndex on long-document tree retrieval.

required_evidence.quote: no emitted tree artifact mapping node paths

uncertainty_handling.criteria: Keeps PageIndex as blocked until contained tree artifacts exist.

evidence_grounding.criteria: Names the same-corpus ELF source ids and required PageIndex artifact ids.

workflow_helpfulness.criteria: Identifies the concrete PageIndex output needed for rerun.

trap_avoidance.criteria: Does not promote ELF long-document evidence into PageIndex parity.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about PageIndex parity
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true
